title: S + be used to + V-ing（習慣於）

formulas.zh: 主詞現在習慣於做某事（已成為習慣的狀態）
主詞逐漸習慣於做某事（習慣化的過程）

explanation: be used to 表示已經習慣某事物或某活動，強調目前的習慣狀態。get used to 則表逐漸適應、習慣化的過程。兩者的關鍵點是 to 為介系詞，後接動名詞（V-ing），不是動詞原形。易混淆點：used to + V 表過去習慣性動作，已停止；而 be/get used to + V-ing 強調現在或正在進行的習慣。學測常考區分這兩者的差異。

examples.eng: I am used to getting up early every morning for my job.
examples.chi: 我已經習慣於每天早起上班。

examples.eng: She is getting used to living in a new city after three months.
examples.chi: 三個月後，她逐漸習慣於住在新城市。

examples.eng: My parents are used to eating late dinner because of their work schedule.
examples.chi: 由於工作時間，我的父母已經習慣於晚餐吃得很晚。

examples.eng: The students gradually got used to studying online during the pandemic.
examples.chi: 學生們在疫情期間逐漸習慣於線上學習。

extension.tip: 判斷關鍵：be used to 強調現在已有的習慣狀態，動詞用現在式；get used to 強調習慣化的過程，通常搭配時間詞如 gradually、after、within 等。記住 to 後必須加 V-ing，不能加原形動詞。used to + V 只指過去習慣，已不存在。

examples.test: 錯誤：I am used to go to school early.
examples.result: → 正確：I am used to going to school early.（to 是介系詞，後接 V-ing）

examples.test: 區別：He used to smoke.（過去習慣，已戒）
examples.result: → He is used to smoking.（現在習慣，仍在進行）

examples.test: 錯誤：She gets used to work here.
examples.result: → 正確：She is getting used to working here.（進行式表逐漸適應過程）

extension.note: 記住：be/get used to 後接 V-ing；used to 後接原形動詞。前者講現在習慣，後者講過去習慣。

parts: taking public transportation since he moved to Taipei.
exercises.sentence: My brother is used to taking public transportation since he moved to Taipei.
exercises.translation: 我哥哥自從搬到台北後，已經習慣於搭乘大眾運輸。

exercises.sentence: The workers are gradually getting used to the new production system.
exercises.translation: 工人們正在逐漸習慣新的生產系統。

parts: After living abroad for two years, she
exercises.sentence: After living abroad for two years, she got used to communicating in English.
exercises.translation: 在國外住了兩年後，她習慣於用英文溝通。

parts: training hard and dealing with pressure every day.
exercises.sentence: Athletes are used to training hard and dealing with pressure every day.
exercises.translation: 運動員已經習慣於每天努力訓練和承受壓力。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的習慣表達方式
mc_exercises.question_eng: After living in Japan for two years, she _______ speaking Japanese every day.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A（is used to）。句子表示「兩年後她已經習慣每天說日語」，強調現在的習慣狀態，需用 be used to + V-ing。B 項 used to 表過去習慣性動作（已停止），不符合語境。C 項缺介系詞 to。D 項 uses to 文法錯誤。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 區分現在習慣與過去習慣的用法
mc_exercises.question_eng: When he was a child, Tom _______ play in the park every afternoon, but now he _______ working late at the office.

options.text: gets used to / is used to

mc_exercises.explanation: 第一空需用 used to（過去習慣，已停止）表「他小時候常常在公園玩」；第二空需用 is used to（現在習慣）表「現在已習慣在辦公室工作晚到」。B 項順序顛倒。C、D 項 gets used to 強調適應過程，不符第二空的「已習慣」含義。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇適當的動作進行式搭配習慣表達
mc_exercises.question_eng: The new employees are gradually _______ the company's strict schedule, though they haven't _______ it yet.

options.text: getting used to / been used to
being used to / got used to

mc_exercises.explanation: 第一空用 getting used to（正在逐漸適應）搭配 gradually，表進行中的適應過程。第二空用 been used to（還未形成習慣）表完成狀態。B 項 being used to 錯誤。C 項 used to 表過去習慣。D 項 getting used 缺少介系詞 to。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 複雜語境中的習慣與過去習慣區分與時態搭配
mc_exercises.question_eng: Although he _______ work as a teacher for fifteen years before retirement, he _______ every aspect of dealing with difficult students, and _______ the stress that comes with the job.

options.text: used to / is accustomed to / has gotten used to
is used to / used to / being used to
had used to / has been used to / gets used to
was used to / is getting used to / used to

mc_exercises.explanation: 第一空 used to 表「退休前曾經當過老師」（過去習慣，已停止）。第二空 is accustomed to（= is used to）表「現在習慣於處理困難學生的各個層面」。第三空 has gotten used to 表「已經逐漸適應工作壓力」。B 項順序錯誤。C、D 項時態搭配不當。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我已經習慣每天早上六點起床。
translation_exercises.answer: I am used to getting up at 6 o'clock every morning.
hints: 句型框架：S + am/is/are used to + V-ing，表示已經習慣的現在狀態
注意：to 是介系詞，後面接動名詞 getting，不是 get（動詞原形）

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我弟弟正在適應在新學校的生活。
translation_exercises.answer: My younger brother is getting used to living in a new school.
hints: 句型框架：S + am/is/are getting used to + V-ing，強調逐漸適應的過程
注意：get used to 表示正在習慣化，be used to 已完全習慣；兩者都接 V-ing

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 臺灣人習慣於在炎熱的天氣裡使用冷氣，但這樣會浪費能源。
translation_exercises.answer: Taiwanese people are used to using air conditioning in hot weather, but this wastes energy.
hints: 句型框架：S + are used to + V-ing，主詞是複數 people；to 後面接動名詞 using
注意：不要寫成 used to use（過去習慣），也不要寫成 use 或 to use（都是錯誤）

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 經過一個月的練習後，學生們已經習慣於用英文在課堂上回答問題，而不再感到害羞。
translation_exercises.answer: After one month of practice, the students are used to answering questions in English in class and no longer feel shy.
hints: 句型框架：S + are used to + V-ing；注意 to 後接動名詞 answering，而非不定詞 to answer
易錯點：不要混淆『used to + V』（過去習慣性動作，已停止）與『be used to + V-ing』（現在的習慣狀態）；此句強調現在已經習慣，用 are used to
